title: tarenaya microcarpa
intro: Tarenaya microcarpa, also known as the Small-flowered Cleome or Small-flowered Spider Flower, is a flowering plant species within the Cleome genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tarenaya microcarpa include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Tarenaya microcarpa may be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
